1. To leave safe mode
sudo -u hdfs hadoop dfsadmin -safemode leave


2. Copy the input.txt file from the desktop to hadoop
hadoop fs -put Desktop/input.txt words.txt

3. To check the file input.txt is present 
hadoop fs -ls

4. To run a jar file name with WordCount.jar
hadoop jar WordCount.jar WordCount.WordCount words.txt output.txt

5. Check the output.txt
hadoop fs -cat output.txt/part-r-00000
